name: personal-website-platform
description: Cost-efficient personal website platform on AWS

scripts.build:backend: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w apps/photo-sharing/backend
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:landing && npm run build:photo-frontend
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' +
